name: Tax-Free Withdrawal of Distilled Spirits for Fuel Use

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must establish a distilled spirits plant solely for producing, processing, storing, and distributing spirits for fuel use and must render the spirits unfit for beverage use.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Distilled spirits produced at a qualified plant exclusively for fuel use may be withdrawn from bonded premises entirely free of tax.
